A* MATRICES PREVIEW AFTER CLICKED GOAL
binary: 0=free, 1=occupied/unknown
inflated: 0=free, 1=blocked after hard inflation
distance: distance to nearest wall in meters
cost: 0.00=safe, 1.00=near obstacle/blocked
g: cost from start, -1 means not reached
f: g+h, -1 means not reached
closed: 1 means cell expanded by A*
path: 1 means final A* path
